brief_nursing_elaboration: Low platelet count increasing bleeding risk. Nursing: bleeding precautions, platelet transfusion coordination, petechiae assessment, stool guaiac monitoring, hemorrhage precautions.
Elevated platelet count increasing clotting risk. Nursing: antiplatelet meds, hydration encouragement, thrombosis precautions, compression stocking, leg elevation, underlying cause investigation.

literal_translation: True increase in red blood cells
brief_nursing_elaboration: Myeloproliferative disorder with RBC overproduction. Nursing: phlebotomy coordination, CBC monitoring, aspirin admin, hydration, thrombosis/hemorrhage precautions, JAK2 mutation assessment.
Severe neutropenia from drugs/disease. Nursing: strict infection precautions, G-CSF admin, fever management, frequent monitoring, reverse isolation if severe, underlying cause identification.
Adrenal/extra-adrenal catecholamine tumor. Nursing: BP monitoring, phentolamine admin, beta-blocker titration, urinary metanephrine monitoring, surgical preparation, hypertensive crisis precautions.
Primary liver cancer from cirrhosis/hepatitis. Nursing: AFP monitoring, imaging follow-up, chemotherapy/radiation coordination, pain management, palliative care discussion, transplant evaluation.

Whipple procedure for pancreatic cancer. Nursing: post-op pain management, nutritional support, exocrine/endocrine replacement, blood glucose monitoring, complications assessment, hospital course extension.
Elevated lymphocyte count from infection/malignancy. Nursing: infection assessment, CBC trending, underlying cause investigation, antibiotic/chemotherapy coordination, differential analysis.
Elevated monocyte count from infection/inflammation. Nursing: infection assessment, CBC trending, WBC differential review, underlying cause investigation, antibiotic therapy.

Elevated eosinophil count from allergy/parasites/malignancy. Nursing: allergy assessment, parasitic infection screening, medication review, symptom evaluation, CBC monitoring, underlying cause treatment.
Low lymphocyte count from HIV/immunosuppression/bone marrow. Nursing: infection precautions, CD4 monitoring (if HIV), immunization assessment, antiretroviral therapy, supportive care.
Inherited/acquired hypercoagulable state. Nursing: anticoagulation therapy, thrombosis precautions, compression stocking, leg elevation, activity encouragement, genetic counseling, family screening.
Inherited clotting factor deficiency (A/B). Nursing: factor replacement, bleeding precautions, PT/INR monitoring, joint protection, emergency notification system, genetic counseling.

prefix_meaning: Named after Erik von Willebrand - discoverer
brief_nursing_elaboration: Most common inherited bleeding disorder. Nursing: desmopressin admin, factor replacement, menstrual bleeding management, genetic counseling, bleeding precautions, family education.
Life-threatening consumptive coagulopathy. Nursing: continuous monitoring, FFP/platelets/cryoprecipitate transfusion, antibiotic for sepsis, blood product management, bleeding/clotting precautions.

literal_translation: Sudden malignant white blood cell proliferation
brief_nursing_elaboration: Acute myeloid/lymphoid leukemia. Nursing: chemotherapy coordination, CBC/platelet/RBC transfusion, infection prevention, tumor lysis syndrome precautions, psychosocial support.

literal_translation: Long-term malignant white blood cell proliferation
brief_nursing_elaboration: Chronic myeloid/lymphoid leukemia. Nursing: tyrosine kinase inhibitor therapy, CBC monitoring, splenomegaly assessment, hydroxyurea consideration, transplant evaluation for CML.

root_2_meaning: Greek: myelos = bone marrow + oma = tumor
literal_translation: Multiple malignant plasma cell tumors in bone marrow
brief_nursing_elaboration: Plasma cell malignancy. Nursing: chemotherapy (bortezomib), pain management, hypercalcemia treatment, renal function monitoring, bone density assessment, stem cell transplant consideration.

literal_translation: Malignant lymphoid tumor with Reed-Sternberg cells
brief_nursing_elaboration: Lymphoid malignancy with characteristic cells. Nursing: chemotherapy (ABVD), radiation coordination, CBC monitoring, infection precautions, fertility counseling, long-term survivor monitoring.

literal_translation: Malignant lymphoid tumor without Reed-Sternberg cells
brief_nursing_elaboration: Diverse lymphoid malignancies. Nursing: chemotherapy type-dependent (rituximab/CHOP), CBC monitoring, infection precautions, nutritional support, psychosocial support, remission monitoring.

literal_translation: Severe sudden lung failure from injury
brief_nursing_elaboration: ARDS from sepsis/aspiration/pneumonia. Nursing: mechanical ventilation, lung-protective ventilation, prone positioning, fluid management, paralytic sedation, stress ulcer prophylaxis, PEEP titration.
COPD (emphysema/chronic bronchitis). Nursing: bronchodilator therapy, corticosteroids, O2 therapy, pulmonary rehabilitation, smoking cessation, exacerbation management, vaccination.

Elevated pulmonary artery pressure. Nursing: pulmonary vasodilators (sildenafil/bosentan/epoprostenol), anticoagulation if idiopathic, right heart function, transplant consideration, exercise limitation.
IPF/sarcoidosis/hypersensitivity pneumonitis. Nursing: pulmonary function testing, high-resolution CT coordination, corticosteroid/immunosuppressive therapy, O2 therapy, pulmonary rehabilitation.
IPF with progressive lung scarring. Nursing: PFT monitoring, pirfenidone/nintedanib therapy, O2 therapy (progressive), pulmonary rehabilitation, lung transplant evaluation, advance care planning.

literal_translation: Sudden inflammation of kidney filtering units
brief_nursing_elaboration: Post-infectious glomerular inflammation. Nursing: fluid/sodium restriction, diuretics, BP management, urinalysis trending, renal function monitoring, corticosteroid consideration, streptococcal treatment.

literal_translation: Long-term inflammation of kidney filtering units
brief_nursing_elaboration: Progressive glomerular scarring. Nursing: ACE inhibitor/ARB therapy, BP control, fluid restriction, nutritional management, ESRD preparation, dialysis education, transplant counseling.
RPGN (anti-GBM/ANCA-associated/immune complex). Nursing: aggressive immunosuppression, plasmapheresis, corticosteroids, renal function monitoring, biopsy coordination, dialysis readiness.

literal_translation: Membrane and cell proliferation in kidney filtering units
brief_nursing_elaboration: MPGN (most common chronic GN). Nursing: immunosuppressive therapy, corticosteroid/cyclophosphamide admin, renal function monitoring, proteinuria assessment, ESRD preparation, transplant evaluation.

literal_translation: IgA antibody deposit disease in kidneys
brief_nursing_elaboration: IgA-dominant GN (most common primary GN). Nursing: ACE inhibitor/ARB therapy, BP control, NSAIDs if mild, fish oil, proteinuria reduction, renal biopsy discussion, supportive care.
GN after streptococcal/viral infection. Nursing: supportive care, fluid management, diuretics, ACE inhibitors, corticosteroids if severe, renal function monitoring, streptococcal treatment.
Glomerular injury from hyperglycemia. Nursing: tight glucose control, ACE inhibitor/ARB therapy, BP management, proteinuria monitoring, dietary protein restriction, ESRD preparation.
Immune complex GN from SLE. Nursing: immunosuppressive therapy (corticosteroids/cyclophosphamide/mycophenolate), renal function monitoring, urinalysis assessment, ANA/complement trending.
MN (subepithelial immune deposits). Nursing: corticosteroid/cyclophosphamide therapy, ACE inhibitors, anticoagulation if nephrotic, nephrotic syndrome management, remission monitoring.

literal_translation: Kidney disease with excessive protein loss
brief_nursing_elaboration: Massive proteinuria (>3.5g/day), hypoalbuminemia, edema. Nursing: diuretics, ACE inhibitors, anticoagulation, salt restriction, albumin infusion if severe, immunosuppressive therapy.
Hematuria/RBC casts/hypertension/mild proteinuria. Nursing: urinalysis assessment, BP control, renal function monitoring, streptococcal screening, corticosteroid consideration if appropriate.
